sizing_rule.note: Position size = number of contracts determined by optimal f corresponding to highest geometric mean. Recalculate f daily when forecast values (U) change, as these affect pricing model equations (5.17a) and (5.17b). Applicable to options/futures with mandated exit dates.

source_rule_text: Position size (number of contracts) should be determined by the optimal f value that corresponds to the highest geometric mean, with adjustments made when different forecast values (U) are applied daily to the pricing model equations.
